question:

A. monthly_metrics.json.bak
B. analysis_report.json.bak
C. data_pipeline_config.json.bak
D. user_activity.json.bak
E. README.md.bak (because we viewed README)
F. The .bak of newly created 20260407_*.json files

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select .bak files that should exist).
